name: Cuckoo's Clock
short_description: Using the power of time manipulation, guide Cuckoo through a deadly clock by speeding up and slowing down a system of cogs, gears, pistons and other surprises in this difficult puzzle platformer!
detailed_description:
Cuckoo’s Clock is a difficult puzzle platformer all about controlling the speed of the level around you. Slow down gears to make it through tight gaps or speed up treadmills to fling you across the stage!

Features

  • A series of 12 stages, or “hours” to complete. Each with a hard to collect feather for those skilled enough to obtain it!

  • A good ending obtained by collecting all 12 feathers!

  • 30+ unlockable skins for you to customize Cuckoo with!

  • A variety of speedrun challenges to overcome, requiring a mastery of both the speed up and slow down mechanics!

  • Several unique contraptions and obstacles working in tandem with each other!

  • And more...

Threats loom in every corner of the clock! Can you make it out and escape to safety?
